variants: Carmen Boyadjian has made significant contributions to the field of Supply Chain Management, leveraging her expertise to influence modern practices. Her doctoral journey was shaped by her mentor, Jonas Pedersen, who provided pivotal guidance. Research findings and articles by Carmen have appeared in the publication venue of Northern Fable House, allowing her to share her insights. The Flintwood Scholars Group has been a primary funding source for her research initiatives. Additionally, Carmen holds a professional license, the Banshee Interpreter Card, showcasing her commitment to her specialization.
